data.title: SoundThinking, a public safety tech provider, reschedules its Q3 2025 financial results conference call to Nov 12 at 4:30 PM EST.
data.description: In Fremont, California, on October 16, 2025, SoundThinking, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSTI), a prominent public safety technology company, disclosed a modification in the date for the release of their third quarter 2025 financial results and associated conference call. This alteration was necessary due to an unexpected scheduling conflict. The earnings conference call is now rescheduled for Wednesday, November 12, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time, replacing the initially slated date of Tuesday, November 11, 2025.

data.title: Herzfeld Credit Income Fund, Inc. announced preliminary results of tender offer to buy up to 5% shares at 97.5% NAV.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, in Miami Beach, Florida, Thomas J. Herzfeld Advisors, Inc., a registered investment adviser, and Herzfeld Credit Income Fund, Inc. (NASDAQ: HERZ), disclosed the initial findings of the Fund's recent cash tender offer. This offer aimed to acquire a maximum of 5% of its common shares at 97.5% of the Fund’s net asset value (NAV) at the conclusion of regular trading on the NASDAQ Capital Market on October 15, 2025, which served as the expiration date of the Tender Offer.

data.title: WillScot (Nasdaq: WSC) to report Q3 2025 results on Nov 6; presenting at investor conference in November.
data.description: Phoenix-based company WillScot Holdings Corporation, a pioneer in temporary flexible space solutions, is set to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on November 6, 2025, once the market concludes for the day. The company, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol WSC, is recognized for its cutting-edge approach in providing such solutions.

data.title: atai Life Sciences plans public offering of common shares on NASDAQ, granting underwriters option to purchase additional shares.
data.description: Atai Life Sciences, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, headquartered in New York and Amsterdam, revealed on October 16, 2025, its plan to initiate a registered underwritten offering of its common shares on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ATAI. The company intends to provide the underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire additional common shares at the public offering price, minus the underwriting discount. All common shares in this offering will be offered by atai. The completion of this proposed offering is reliant on market conditions and other factors, with no definitive guarantee on the timing or success of the offering, as well as the precise size and terms of the offering.

data.title: US FDA designates BPL-003 nasal spray for treatment-resistant depression as Breakthrough Therapy.NASDAQ: ATAI#NASDAQ #MentalHealth
data.description: On October 16, 2025, atai Life Sciences (ATAI) and Beckley Psytech Limited revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has given Breakthrough Therapy designation (BTD) to BPL-003 (mebufotenin benzoate) nasal spray. This medication is intended for adult individuals dealing with treatment-resistant depression (TRD). The strategic collaboration between atai and Beckley Psytech aims to establish a dominant force in innovative mental health treatments. Atai Life Sciences is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ATAI.

data.title: Hub Group (Nasdaq: HUBG) to discuss Q3 2025 results on Oct 30th at 5:00pm ET. Results released after market close.
data.description: Hub Group, Inc. headquartered in Oak Brook, Illinois, is scheduled to conduct a conference call on Thursday, October 30, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to deliberate on their performance in the third quarter of 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq as HUBG, will release the results through a press release after the market closes on the same day.

data.title: LifeStance Health Group (NASDAQ: LFST) to release Q3 2025 earnings on Nov 6, 2025; one of largest mental health care providers.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, LifeStance Health Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFST), a prominent outpatient mental health care provider based in Scottsdale, Arizona, announced that it will release its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Thursday, November 6, 2025. LifeStance Health Group, Inc. is known as one of the leading providers of mental health care services in the nation. Investors and the general public can anticipate the earnings report to be made available before the market opens on the specified date.

data.title: WORK Medical Technology Group LTD will implement a 1-for-100 reverse stock split on October 21, 2025. Symbol: WOK; CUSIP: G9767H117.
data.description: Hangzhou, China - On October 16, 2025, WORK Medical Technology Group LTD (Nasdaq: WOK), a prominent medical device supplier in China, revealed plans for a reverse stock split of its ordinary shares at a ratio of 1-for-100. The Reverse Stock Split will be implemented through its subsidiary, Work (Hangzhou) Medical Treatment Equipment Co., Ltd., and its affiliated entities in China. Trading of the Company's Class A ordinary shares post-split will commence on October 21, 2025. The shares will still be listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol "WOK," with a fresh CUSIP number G9767H117.

data.title: Lite Strategy, Inc. celebrates 14 years of Litecoin, signals for institutional investment before 2026 with potential growth.
data.description: Lite Strategy, Inc. celebrates the 14-year milestone of Litecoin and offers investors timely entry to LTC's institutional capabilities.

data.title: GoPro to release Q3 earnings on Nov. 6, 2025, after market closes. Conference call to be hosted by management.
data.description: GoPro, Inc., based in San Mateo, California, disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter closing on September 30, 2025. The information will be revealed post-market closure on Thursday, November 6, 2025. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GPRO, will also conduct a conference call managed by GoPro management.

data.title: Live Nation Entertainment plans investor events for Q3 2025, sets date for earnings release and teleconference.
data.description: Los Angeles, October 16, 2025 - Live Nation Entertainment, Inc., a prominent live entertainment company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker LYV, has announced two upcoming investor gatherings. These events include the release of their third-quarter financial results and a corresponding teleconference. Live Nation's third-quarter 2025 earnings report will be made public during the scheduled events.

data.title: Texas Children's Hospital nurse Morgan Fischer named 2025 National Magnet Nurse of the Year for Transformational Leadership.
data.description: In Houston, on October 16, 2025, Texas Children's Hospital shared the news that Morgan Fischer, BSN, RNC-OB, C-EFM, a Labor & Delivery nurse at Pavilion for Women, has been recognized as the 2025 National Magnet Nurse of the Year for Transformational Leadership. This esteemed award highlights Fischer's exceptional leadership skills in the healthcare field.

Wall Street extended a weeklong stretch of volatility as bad loans at Zions Bancorp and Western Alliance raised concerns over credit quality, pushing the S&P 500 down 0.6% and sparking a 6.3% drop in the regional banking ETF, even as AI-related optimism boosted select tech stocks

Treasuries and gold rallied amid risk-off sentiment, while investors monitored the US-China trade tensions, the Fed’s rate guidance, and earnings reports from major companies—including Salesforce, Tesla, and Merck KGaA—for signs of market direction.

data.title: CommScope stockholders approve CCS sale to Amp, with 70% holders voting in favor. $COMM #InvestorRelations
data.description: Claremont, North Carolina - CommScope Holding Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: COMM), a key player in network connectivity solutions globally, revealed that 70% of the company's outstanding stock as of September 8, 2025, supported the planned sale of the Company’s Connectivity and Cable Solutions (CCS) business to Amp. This includes both the common stock and Series A Preferred Stock when counted as a unified class.

data.title: BigBear.ai (NYSE: BBAI) will report Q3 2025 results on Nov 10, 2025 at 4:15 pm ET, followed by an earnings call.
data.description: BigBear.ai, a prominent player in AI-driven decision intelligence solutions, revealed plans to unveil its Q3 financial results on Monday, November 10, 2025, around 4:15 pm ET. The company, listed as BBAI on NYSE, will conduct an earnings call on the same day following the release. Interested parties can access the earnings report through the investor relations webpage at https://ir.bigbear.ai. Further information regarding the earnings call will be posted on the investor relations site as well.

data.title: Zuora named a Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Recurring Billing Apps, based on Ability to Execute and Vision.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, Zuora Inc., a prominent monetization platform for modern businesses, has been recognized by Gartner as a Leader in the Magic Quadrant for Recurring Billing Applications. This positioning was determined through an evaluation of the company’s Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision. Zuora's success can be attributed to its adaptability in monetization strategies, incorporating subscription, usage-based, and hybrid models to meet evolving market needs.

data.title: Motorola Solutions (NYSE: MSI) to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 30, webcast analyst call at 4pm Central time.
data.description: Motorola Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: MSI) is set to release its third-quarter 2025 earnings data on October 30 after the market closes. Following this, the company will conduct its quarterly conference call with financial analysts on the same day at 4 p.m. Central (5 p.m. Eastern). The call will be streamed live at motorolasolutions.com/investors. Motorola Solutions is dedicated to enhancing safety and security in all its endeavors.
